title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Boat Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Boat Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Boat Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Boat Digital Technologies:
Boat Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
